Project Description:
- Multi-supplier framework agreement for IT-Consulting across the WIENER STADTWERKE (WStW) group
- Term: 2+2+1 years (max. 5 Jahre)
- Expected volume: ca. EUR 80 Mio. over 5 years (ca. EUR 16 Mio./Jahr)
- Topics: IT Architektur; Solution Design inkl. Systems-Integration; IT-Security; New Technologies; Analytics & Business Intelligence
- Roles to supply: Partner, Senior Manager, Manager, Senior IT Consultant, IT Consultant, Junior IT Consultant
- Call-offs managed centrally by WienIT; decentralized draw-down by WStW companies; no purchase obligation; offers must cover total scope; no variants/alternatives; German language required
Important Dates:
- Questions deadline: 19.08.2024 12:00
- Stage 1 (Teilnahmeantrag) deadline: 19.08.2024 12:00
- Invitation to bid (Stage 2): 09.09.2024
- Offer submission (Stage 2): 09.10.2024
- Decision: mid-12/2024

Scope & Requirements.Scope & Requirements:
- Services (framework): IT consulting and delivery support across WStW
- Topics covered:
  - IT Architektur: target architectures, roadmaps, standards
  - Solution Design inkl. Systems-Integration: solution selection, process/UI/interface design, data fueling/management
  - IT-Security: security concepts, threat/vulnerability identification, countermeasures, SW/HW security improvements
  - New Technologies: technology potential analyses, data migration analyses, business cases, best practice
  - Analytics & BI: data models, dashboards, predictive models, Data Science (e.g., Predictive Maintenance, Customer Analytics), integration into processes (focus tools: Power BI, Microstrategy, SAP BW)
- Typical tasks:
  - Project execution/support; program management (budget/milestones/resources)
  - Business analysis, solution design, roadmaps, documentation/knowledge transfer
  - Quality controls, issue detection, remediation proposals; best practices input
- Roles required (experience thresholds):
  - Partner: >10y IT consulting leadership or subject expert; >15y total
  - Senior Manager: >5y complex PM or expert; >9y total
  - Manager: >2y complex PM or expert; >7y total
  - Senior IT Consultant: 1–2y PM or expert; 5–7y total
  - IT Consultant: 3–5y total
  - Junior IT Consultant: 1–3y total
- Constraints/conditions:
  - German (spoken/written) required
  - No partial bids; no alternative/modified offers
  - Call-offs may be on daily or hourly basis; centrally managed by WienIT; decentralized usage by WStW companies
Scope & Requirements.Contract Volume:
- Expected: ca. EUR 16,000,000 p.a.; ca. EUR 80,000,000 over 5 years
- Mengengewichte (roles, for price calc): Partner 0.03; Senior Manager 0.05; Manager 0.12; Senior IT Consultant 0.25; IT Consultant 0.35; Junior 0.2
Scope & Requirements.Place of Performance: Wien; services for WIENER STADTWERKE group companies (decentralized call-offs across the WStW group)
Scope & Requirements.Standards & Certifications:
- WSTW 9310 (Teil 1, 12.09.2018) – Eignungsanforderungen
- WSTW 9313 (01.01.2024) – Vertragsbestimmungen
- BVergG 2018; WVRG 2020
- DSGVO; NISG (where applicable)
- ÖNORM A 2050; ÖNORM A 2063-1/-2
Scope & Requirements.Subcontracting & Consortia:
- Subcontracting allowed; must declare and obtain prior written approval; must prove suitability; changes require approval
- Reliance on third-party capacities permitted with binding commitment
- Bidding consortium (ARGE) permitted; max 3 members; joint and several liability; designate lead member
Scope & Requirements.Forms & e-Submission:
- Channel: WSTW Vergabeportal https://wstw.vergabeportal.at
- Qualified electronic signature required
- Stage 1 submit: T1 (Teilnahmeantrag), E3, E4–E5, T2 (if BG), T3–T4 (if SUB), T5 (EU 2022/576, if applicable)
- Stage 2: E6–E9, ZB1, P (Preisblatt) – submit as provided

Offer Submission Documents: Use only provided templates; Word/Excel originals also to be submitted
List of Documents: Trade/professional register excerpt (e.g., GISA) showing required authorizations
Liability insurance policy/coverage confirmation (≥ EUR 5,000,000; property & personal damage)
KSV1870 rating ≤ 399 or equivalent (Moody’s ≥ Baa3; S&P/Fitch ≥ BBB-)
Turnover proof: ≥ EUR 15,000,000 p.a. (2023/2022/2021) in consulting; or 12× avg monthly/year if <3y
Insolvency register excerpt (§256 IO) or equivalent
Companies register excerpt (§33 FBG) and GISA info (§365e GewO) or equivalent
Social security clearance and tax arrears certificate (§229a BAO) or equivalent
Criminal record (company/officials; §10 StRegG / §89m GOG) or equivalent

Economic & Financial Standing.Minimum Turnover: Each of 2023/2022/2021: ≥ EUR 15,000,000 (excl. VAT) in the consulting segment; if <3 years: 12× average monthly turnover per year (CPA by tax advisor/WP).
Economic & Financial Standing.Turnover in Comparable Services: Consulting segment revenues as above; confirm via financial statements or CPA/WP confirmation.

Legal & Registration.Trade/Professional Register Entry: Register excerpt (e.g., GISA) showing authorization; EU/EWR: §373a GewO notice by participation deadline; CH: ≤ 90 workdays/year (§373b GewO).
Legal & Registration.Self-declarations (GWB §§123/124 or equi: No exclusion grounds per §78/§249 BVergG; sanctions-VO (EU) 2022/576 compliance; confirmations for officials/procurists.
Legal & Registration.Subcontractor Identification & Reliance: Name SUB/Dritte in T3/T4; declare reliance (A/B/C/D); binding commitment of capacities; changes/new SUB only with prior written consent.

Technical & Professional Ability.Personnel Profiles:
- Required roles & minimum experience:
  - Partner IT Consulting: >10y (lead/expert) & >15y total; senior mgmt communication; broad IT & business know-how
  - Senior Manager IT Consulting: >5y complex PM/expert & >9y total
  - Manager IT Consulting: >2y complex PM/expert & >7y total
  - Senior IT Consultant: 1–2y PM/expert & 5–7y total
  - IT Consultant: 3–5y total
  - Junior IT Consultant: 1–3y total
- German language (spoken/written) required for all roles.
Technical & Professional Ability.Headcount / Staffing:
- Minimum available consultants (Formblatt E3): Partner 1; Senior Manager 2; Manager 4; Senior IT Consultant 8; IT Consultant 10; Junior 5
- Stage 2: submit 30 CVs; AG selects 5 for presentation.
Technical & Professional Ability.Reference Projects: - Personnel-specific references not mandated; focus on bidder project references. CVs must show relevant skills, methods, tools and role seniority.

Company Referrals:
- Stage 1 (T2): exactly 2 completed bidder references from last 36 months; must cover 2 distinct areas among ARC/SD/SEC/NT/ABI; use E4–E5; client confirmation required; include project value (€), person-days, duration (weeks).
- Stage 2: 3 more references covering remaining areas (total 5 areas each covered once); ≥1 reference with client from transport or energy sector; last 36 months (counted to end of offer period).
Award Criteria:
- Best-value; framework with 3 partners
- Weighting (max 100):
  - Price 55%: based on mengengewichteter Durchschnittstagessatz inkl. pauschale NK (Anhang P). Formula: Points = (Lowest Price × 100) / Offer Price
  - Quality 40%:
    - Project References – Part 2: 40% of Quality (max 16 pts). Scoring by note 1–5 -> 16/12/8/4/0
    - Offer Presentation: 60% of Quality (max 24 pts). 5 bidders invited; 5 consultants (10+10 min each) + 2 references (2×(20+10) min). Scoring by note 1–5 -> 24/18/12/6/0
  - Employees 50+ 5%: ≤1 =0 pts; 2–4 =3 pts; ≥5 =5 pts (must be among the 30 CVs)
- Tie-breakers: higher Price points; then higher Quality; then higher Presentation; then extend decimal places.
